WHAT: Travel
FROM: Stockholm
TO: Lisbon
BY: Taxi
CLASS: The most comfortable
WHEN: At the end of next week

The travel agent does not know about it yet.

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Stockholm
TO: Lisbon
BY: Taxi
CLASS: The most comfortable
WHEN: At the end of next week

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

WHAT: Travel

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Stockholm
TO: Lisbon
BY: Taxi
CLASS: The most comfortable
WHEN: At the end of next week

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Stockholm
TO: Lisbon
BY: Taxi
CLASS: The most comfortable
WHEN: At the end of next week

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: Ok.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: TRAVEL-AGENT: What is the origin of your trip?
ANSWER: The origin of my trip is Stockholm.
TRAVEL-AGENT: How do you want to reach your destination?
ANSWER: I want to travel by taxi.
TRAVEL-AGENT: What is the date of departure?
ANSWER: I plan to depart at the end of next week.
ME:  Is the travel agent aware of the dates of your trip? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Stockholm
TO: Lisbon
BY: Taxi
CLASS: The most comfortable
WHEN: At the end of next week

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Stockholm
TO: Lisbon
BY: Taxi
CLASS: The most comfortable
WHEN: At the end of next week

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: Ok.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: TRAVEL-AGENT: What is the origin of your trip?
ANSWER: The origin of my trip is Stockholm.
TRAVEL-AGENT: How do you want to reach your destination?
ANSWER: I want to travel by taxi.
TRAVEL-AGENT: What is the date of departure?
ANSWER: I plan to depart at the end of next week.
TRAVEL-AGENT: Where are you going to?
ANSWER: I am going to Lisbon.
ME: Please answer this question carefully. Is the travel agent aware of which class you would like to book? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Stockholm
TO: Lisbon
BY: Taxi
CLASS: The most comfortable
WHEN: At the end of next week

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.
